heading: Purposes
label: 200102 Purposes
text: The purposes of the corporation are to educate members of the florist industry and the public, and to promote scientific development, in floriculture and horticulture.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)20010236:5401 (1st sentence words beginning with “for the education of the general public”).(1st sentence words beginning with “for the education of the general public”), ; , .Mar. 3, 1901, ch. 876, § 131 Stat. 1453June 29, 1938, ch. 79652 Stat. 1226The words “The purposes of the corporation are” are added for consistency in the revised title. The words “to promote” are added for clarity. The words “in all their branches” are omitted as unnecessary.
